name: A curated list of amazingly awesome Nomad tools and shiny things.
description: A curated list of amazingly awesome Nomad tools and shiny things.

links.title: hashicorp/damon
links.description: An early stage terminal dashboard for Nomad.

links.title: robinovitch61/wander
links.description: A terminal UI for Nomad.

links.title: hashicorp/nomad-autoscaler
links.description: HashiCorp's official Nomad Autoscaler. Supports scaling allocations within Nomad and scaling nodes on AWS, Azure, GCP, or arbitrary infrastructure via plugins.

links.title: lucretius/nomad-elastigroup-autoscaler
links.description: Nomad Autoscaler plugin for [Spot.io Elastigroup](https://spot.io/products/elastigroup/).

links.title: getnelson/nelson
links.description: Lights-out deployment and lifecycle manager for Nomad (and other pluggable schedulers). Fully integrated with Vault and Consul. Optionally can act as a control plane for your traffic routing teir.

links.title: jenkinsci/nomad-plugin
links.description: Jenkins plugin to allow using Nomad Jobs to scale out Jenkins build slaves.

links.title: hashicorp/levant
links.description: A templating and deployment tool for HashiCorp Nomad jobs that provides realtime feedback and detailed failure messages upon deployment issues.

links.title: hashicorp/setup-nomad-pack
links.description: HashiCorp-maintained GitHub Action for `nomad-pack`.

links.title: nomad-ops/nomad-ops
links.description: A simple way to deploy workloads via GitOps. Similar to ArgoCD with a UI.

links.title: sunshard-prism/prism-nomad)
links.description: Prism is a tool that simplifies the creation of Nomad job configuration templates and deploys them to a remote cluster.

links.title: gerrowadat/nomad-gitops
links.description: Another implementation of 'gitops' style drift detection and deployment for Nomad.

links.title: CarbonCollins/nomad-usb-device-plugin
links.description: A USB device plugin for nomad deployments.

links.title: Deuxfleurs/nomad-driver-nix2
links.description: A driver to run Nix jobs on Nomad.

links.title: JanMa/nomad-driver-nspawn
links.description: A nomad task driver to run containers with [systemd-nspawn](https://www.freedesktop.org/software/systemd/man/systemd-nspawn.html).

links.title: Roblox/nomad-driver-containerd
links.description: A nomad task driver for [containerd](https://containerd.io). Documentation on [`nomadproject.io`](https://www.nomadproject.io/docs/drivers/external/containerd).

links.title: Roblox/nomad-driver-iis
links.description: A nomad task driver to run [windows IIS](https://www.iis.net/) tasks.

links.title: sevensolutions/nomad-iis
links.description: A nomad task driver to run [windows IIS](https://www.iis.net/) tasks.

links.title: sorenisanerd/nomad-docker-driver-external
links.description: External version of the docker driver for Nomad.

links.title: hashicorp/nomad-pack-community-registry
links.description: The official community registry for Nomad Pack templates.

links.title: axsuul/nomad-event-streamer
links.description: A tool for sending Nomad events to your favorite destinations like Discord and Slack.

links.title: ngine-io/chaotic
links.description: Chaos monkey with integrated nomad support. Runs as batch job or service and kills allocations periodically and randomly.

links.title: jsiebens/hashi-up
links.description: A lightweight utility to install Nomad (and other HashiCorp tools) on any remote Linux host.

links.title: let-sh/nomad-deploy-result-action
links.description: A GitHub action for automating Nomad deploys with GitOps.

links.title: koyeb/kreconciler
links.description: A library for building operators and reconcilers on top of Nomad (or other schedulers).

links.title: mr-karan/nomad-events-sink
links.description: Ships nomad event logs to dedicated sinks

links.title: mr-karan/nomcfg
links.description: A ui for generating nomad job specs

links.title: Roblox/nomad-node-problem-detector
links.description: A tool used to detect problems on Nomad nodes based on user-defined health checks.

links.title: hashicorp/nomad-pack
links.description: An official templating tool and package manager for Nomad, currently a Tech Preview.

links.title: dmaes/nomad-logger
links.description: Watch Nomad allocations and update logshipper config.

links.title: Deuxfleurs/albatros
links.description: A lightweight and (quasi-)stateless CI built on top of Nomad.

links.title: kamilcuk/nomad-tools
links.description: `docker run` for Nomad, watch all logs and events of a job in the terminal, copy files to/from host and allocations, manage Nomad variables as files, list ports associated with job, implementation of [custom `gitlab-runner` executor](https://docs.gitlab.com/runner/executors/custom.html) that executes Gitlab CI/CD jobs as Nomad jobs.

links.title: anubhavmishra/envoy-consul-sds
links.description: A tutorial on how to get Envoy running on Nomad and using Envoy's SDS(Service Discovery Service) to access Consul API.

links.title: kelseyhightower/hashiconf-eu-2016
links.description: Repo from a talk on building out a deployment with GCE/Consul/Nomad/Fabio loadbalancer. Check out the talk on youtube: https://www.youtube.com/watch?v=Nosa5-xcATw

links.title: pete0emerson/hashipoc
links.description: A Vagrant driven example of getting Consul / Vault / Nomad up and running with a sample app deployed

links.title: fhemberger/nomad-demo
links.description: Vagrant based demo setup for running Hashicorp Consul, Nomad and Vault, including sample apps for Docker, JRE and a basic monitoring setup. Uses Traefik as load balancer to pick up services directly from Consul catalog.

links.title: prabirshrestha/synology-nomad
links.description: HashiCorp Nomad Package for Synology DSM 7+. Includes client and server.
